name: Kokt Orrett (Boiled Trout)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the trout thoroughly.
2. Place the trout in a shallow pan and add cider vinegar and enough water to cover the fish.
3. Add salt, place the pan on the stove over medium-high heat.
4. When the water just begins to boil, remove the pan from the heat and let stand, covered, for 10 -15 minutes.
5. Carefully lift the fish to a platter using tongs or a spatula.
6. In a separate bowl, cream together the softened butter and chopped parsley until light and fluffy.
7. Serve the buttered parsley mixture with the trout.
8. Garnish the platter with lemon wedges.
